steps.title: Recognize like terms
steps.content: Both terms have the same variable part: $x^3$. Like terms can be combined by operating on their coefficients.

steps.title: Combine the coefficients
steps.content: Since the variable parts are identical, subtract the coefficients and keep $x^3$: $$11x^3 - 5x^3 = (11 - 5)x^3 = 6x^3$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
